race.comment: CALL ME SASSY (13) has yet to finish out of the money in her seven career starts and expected to go one better today. Just over six weeks between runs when she closed late for a sound second over 1200m at Newcastle. Maps well and strips fitter for this. Expected to go close. WHOA NELLIE (7) progressive filly. Failed to make it three straight wins when she had excuses from the wide gate for a respectable sixth over 1500m at Randwick in stronger class. Tricky gate again and not without top-three prospects. YACHIYO (8) returns from a lengthy break after racing well in Victoria in stronger races last spring. Fitted with the two trials and gets her chance from the good draw. PANIC (5) holding his form on the country tracks and brings a solid set of figures with the 3kg claim. Keep safe.
